title: Leash Master
body:
![Leash Master](https://i.imgur.com/GPJqX5d.png)
Experience the ultimate control with Leash Master.
This plugin allows players to leash mobs and even other players with ease!

---

1. Installation: Simply drop the jar file into your plugins folder and restart the server.
 
2. Permissions: Administrators must grant players permission to leash entities using the following permission node:
   - `leashmaster.leash.*`: Grants permission to leash all entities.
   - `leashmaster.leash.<entityType>`: Grants permission to leash specific entity types (replace `<entityType>` with the desired entity type, e.g., `zombie`).
   - `leashmaster.leashable.player`: Grants players the ability to be leashed by other players.
   - `leashmaster.leash.player`: Allows players to leash other players.

3. Usage:
   - To leash mobs and players: Just Right-click on a mob or player with a lead in hand.

---

Dependency:
[LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net/)

---
